creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
At Sun, 17 Feb 2013 13:08:54 +0100,
Michael Gr=FCnewald wrote:
>=20
> Hi Timothy,
>=20
> thank you for your patch.  I submitted a similar patch for several
> weeks, see ports/173453.  Would you mind testing the latter and report
> if you notice important differences?
>=20
> This PR is a duplicate of ports/173453 and should be closed.  Future
> conversation on this topic should take place in ports/173453.
>=20
> Thank you for your help!
> Michael

Hi Michael,

Oops, I should have checked for incoming PRs before I submitted that patch.=
  I am glad to know that a fix is ready!

I'm not sure if mine is better or worse, but one nice thing about my patch =
is that it requires fewer patches to source files (I get rid of two patches=
, change tiffread.c, and leave the remaining patches the same), so it might=
 be easier for you to maintain.

I don't know if all image formats actually render properly in mine, as I ju=
st compiled Active DVI and ran the program after installing the library, bu=
t my patch certainly compiled properly with all or none of the formats enab=
led.

It might be worth incorporating some of the changes later, if you are inter=
ested.  But, as long as it works, I don't mind either way.

Regards,
Tim
